inbox.title: Enhance Outlook Rooms Calendar for Managing Multiple Conference Rooms and Meeting Details
inbox.description:
Good morning,

I'm hoping someone can help me with a way to select rooms for meetings.  We have multiple conference rooms and multiple users (including our NCWorks team who are not CW employees).  I'm not sure if I am explaining this well, but we need a better way to manage the following spaces:


  *   Conference Room 1
  *   Conference Room 2
  *   Combined Conference Rooms 1 & 2 (there is a retractable wall and for larger meetings, we need to use both)
  *   NextGen Conference Room
  *   Team Room 2
  *   Team Room 3
  *   Charlotte Works Conference Room

If there is a way to add fields, we it would be helpful to add:

  *   Number of attendees
  *   Technology needs
  *   Other

We probably need to have a conversation to better explain this.  I am available today until 3:00.

Thanks!

Aly

Alyson M Ferko
Organizational Support Manager
8601 McAlpine Park Dr|Suite 130|Charlotte, NC  28211
704-206-1344 Direct
aferko@charlotteworks.com<mailto:aferko@charlotteworks.com> | www.charlotteworks.com<http://www.charlotteworks.com/>

[cid:image001.jpg@01DCA70C.60F705C0]

Our Mission: Leading the development of a skilled and in-demand workforce by engaging businesses, aligning community partners, empowering and connecting job seekers to meaningful employment, and fostering inclusive economic growth.

inbox.title: Unable to log in to laptop due to Duo authentication issue
inbox.description:
Hello refresh,

I am having trouble to log in to the laptop. The duo portion sees not working. Can you please help me. See attached picture of the error that I am seeing. Thanks






Get Outlook for iOS<https://aka.ms/o0ukef>

inbox.title: ITAD Summit 2026 (IT Asset Disposition) - Secure Your Hotel early at Las Vegas
inbox.description:
From marketing <marketing@HotelBookingHome.com>: Dear Exhibitors,
We are pleased to offer exclusive hotel booking options for ITAD Summit 2026 (IT Asset Disposition), taking place in August 4-5, 2026 - The Bellagio - Las Vegas.
To make your accommodation easier, we’ve selected top-rated hotels near the venue with exclusive rates:
• The Bellagio – 0.0 miles | 5*| $259 per night instead of $289
Special rate with limited availability
(Booking link will be included below)
Book Now<https://signnow.com/s/4z15BBck>
 • The Palazzo at The Venetian Resort – 0.9 miles | 5*| $229 per night
(Booking link will be included below)
Book Now<https://signnow.com/s/ZpICo6Vc>
 All bookings include:
• Instant confirmation by email
• Free changes (names, dates, rooms) up to 15 days before check-in
• Transparent pricing – no hidden costs

Note: 10% Discount for group reservation (more than 8 rooms)
We recommend booking early to secure the best rate and preferred location.
Best regards,
Linda Henry
Reservations Team
Email: marketing@ExhibitsBookingKey.com<mailto:marketing@ExhibitsBookingKey.com>
